One Platform to Grow and retain Your Customers

RZR connects mobile UA, retargeting, and CTV as one intelligence system that learns from every signal and compounds impact across every touchpoint
Get Started

One Platform to Acquire, Retain, and Grow Your Customers

RZR connects mobile UA, retargeting, CTV, and influencer as one intelligence system that learns from every signal and compounds impact across every touchpoint.

Scaling the World’s Most Ambitious Brands

Stop managing channels. 
Start growing customers.

Your customers move across mobile, TV, and social. Your growth platform should too. RZR connects every touchpoint and learns from every screen to optimize for lifetime value.

One Connected 
Intelligence System

One system learning from every channel simultaneously

Retention - led Growth
Across Every Channel

CTV

Connect TV impressions to mobile outcomes with deterministic targeting that drives results, not just reach.

Learn more
User Acquisition

Predict which users will drive long-term value before you bid, then optimize for retention from day one.

Learn more
Retargeting 

Re-engage lapsed users with the highest probability to return, spend, and stay active.

Learn more
Encore

Encore is RZR's proprietary AI-supervised machine learning platform. It powers bid decisions across mobile UA, retargeting, CTV campaigns — predicting user value at impression and learning continuously from the data.

Learn more

Ready for Impact?

See how a unified growth system compounds performance across your entire funnel — from first impression to long-term value.

Contact us
